focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
【金融新闻】遭遇航班超售，这份权益保障指南请查收
【中国新闻】伊朗圣城马什哈德发生枪击事件 致2人死亡
【世界新闻】All the best looks from Paris Haute Couture Week 2026

items.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
items.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that co

items.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
items.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

items.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
items.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

items.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
items.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

items.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
items.summary: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

items.title: 遭遇航班超售，这份权益保障指南请查收
items.summary: 可免费退改签，有权要求现金补偿，若滞留航司需承担食宿交通费用

items.title: 骑行经济车轮加速转动，共享单车驶向更多场景
items.summary: 从“最后一公里”的代步工具，到休闲运动“潮流单品”

items.title: 未来5年碳达峰工作如何推进，有了清晰的“路线图”
items.summary: 日前，国务院印发《“十五五”碳达峰行动方案》(以下简称《行动方案》)，未来5年碳达峰工作如何推进，有了清晰的“路线图”。

items.title: 洪涝导致财产损失，保险怎么理赔？
items.summary: 受台风“美莎克”影响，广西多地遭遇持续性极端强降水。南宁、贵港等地内涝严重，房屋泡水、车辆浸泡、农田倒伏，这种情况下，保险怎么理赔？

items.title: 微短剧如何奔向长赛道
items.summary: 微短剧如何奔向长赛道(人民眼·新大众文艺)

items.title: 伊朗圣城马什哈德发生枪击事件 致2人死亡
items.summary: 中新网7月10日电 据土耳其阿纳多卢通讯社(AA)援引伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社当地时间10日凌晨消息，伊朗东北部圣城马什哈德发生一起枪击事件，已造成2人死亡。

items.title: 伯纳姆获数百名工党议员支持，有望成为英国下一任首相
items.summary: 中新网7月10日电 综合法新社、英国广播公司(BBC)报道，当地时间9日，英国工党启动党首提名程序。英国议会下院议员、前大曼彻斯特市长安迪·伯纳姆表示，他已自荐成为工党党首，目前是唯一候选人。

items.title: 赞比亚副总统所乘直升机起飞时发生事故 机上人员安全
items.summary: 当地时间9日，赞比亚政府发布公告称，赞比亚一空军直升机于当天早些时候在该国穆钦加省纳孔德起飞时发生事故，所幸搭乘这架直升机的赞比亚副总统穆塔莱·纳卢曼戈以及机上其他人员均安全无恙。

items.title: 特朗普与内塔尼亚胡通话 通报美在海湾地区行动
items.summary: 中新网7月10日电 据法新社报道，当地时间9日，以色列总理办公室表示，美国总统特朗普就美方在海湾地区的行动与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通话。早些时候，伊朗方面报道称美国发动了新一轮空袭。

items.title: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数升至3889人
items.summary: 中新网7月10日电 综合外媒报道，委内瑞拉全国代表大会主席豪尔赫·罗德里格斯9日表示，该国近日发生的两次强震已造成3889人死亡、16740人受伤。

items.title: All the best looks from Paris Haute Couture Week 2026
items.summary: Scorching temperatures in the French capital accompanied the hottest week in haute couture.

items.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

items.title: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.summary: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.

items.title: We saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
items.summary: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

items.title: Motherhood not all warm and fuzzy: Bollywood actor's play spotlights messier side
items.summary: As a society, we take mothers for granted and raising children is a thankless job, says actor Kalki Koechlin.

items.summary: Command & Conquer Generals: Zero Hour running natively on macOS, iPhone & iPad — real engine (EA GPL v3 source, via GeneralsX), DXVK/MoltenVK renderer, RTS touch controls. No game assets included.
